issue.message: Reflective access to installFlags, which is not part of the public SDK and therefore likely to change in future Android releases
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.

Incorrect formatting string `home_greeting_7`; missing conversion character in '`% e`'?
Incorrect formatting string `home_greeting_7`; missing conversion character in '`% g`'?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="home_greeting_7">Réamhaisnéis an lae inniu: seans 100% go ndéanfar paisteáil</string>

issue.message: Incorrect formatting string `home_greeting_7`; missing conversion character in '`% s`'?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="home_greeting_7">I dagens varsel: 100% sjanse for patching</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_5">કોફી બ્રેકની ભલામણ કરવામાં આવી રહી છે... ☕</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">કૃપા કરીને જ્યાં સુધી કેપ્ટન \"પેચિંગ ચાલુ છે\" ચિહ્ન બંધ ન કરે ત્યાં સુધી બેઠેલા રહો... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_13">તમારી પેચ થયેલી એપ્લિકેશનને રાંધી રહ્યા છીએ, ગરમ અને તાજી... 🍳</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_16">વધારે શક્તિથી દબાવી રહ્યા છીએ, જેમ કે ડિજિટલ લીંબુમાંથી રસ... 🍋</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_19">તમારી ઍપને થોડો તાવ આવ્યો છે, અને એની એક જ દવા છે, ઢગલાબંધ પેચિસ... 🩺🔔</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?

issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_15">Bütün sistemlər nominaldır... yamaqlanma işi cizgisi sabitdir... 🚀 </string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_15">Svi sustavi nominalni... putanja patchanja je stabilna… 🚀</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_14">Bi xweşî bi kodeyê qebûl bike... 🤝</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">يرجى البقاء في مقعدك حتى يطفئ القبطان علامة \"جارٍ الإصلاح\"... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_17">Tətbiqi yeni, daha yaxşı özünü təqdir etməyə həvəsləndirir... 🌱 </string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Моля, оставете седнали докато капитанът изключи знака за \"Поправяне в процес...\"… 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">প্যাচিং চলাকালীন \"পাইলট পার্চিং চালু\" চিহ্ন নেভে না যাওয়া পর্যন্ত দয়া করে আপনার আসন থেকে না নামাই... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Bliv venligst siddende, indtil kaptajnen slukker for \"Udbedring i gang\" skiltet... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Bitte bleib sitzen, bis der Kapitän das \"Patching in progress\" Schild ausschaltet... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Παρακαλώ παραμείνετε καθιστοί μέχρι ο πιλότος να σβήσει το σήμα \"Επιδιόρθωση σε εξέλιξη\"... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Por favor, permanezca sentado hasta que el capitán apague el letrero de \"Parche en progreso\"... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Pysy paikallasi, kunnes kapteeni sammuttaa \'Korjaus meneillään\' -merkin... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_13">Ag cócaireacht d\'aip phaiisteáilte, te agus úr... 🍳</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Kérjük maradjon ülve, amíg a kapitány kikapcsolja a \"Patchelés folyamatban\" feliratot... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Harap tetap duduk hingga kapten mematikan tanda \"Sedang menambal\" ... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Si prega di rimanere seduti fino a quando il capitano non spegne il cartello \"Patching in corso\"... 💺✈️</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Blijf zitten totdat de kapitein het \"Patching in progress\"-teken uitschakelt... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Proszę pozostać na swoim miejscu, dopóki kapitan nie wyłączy znaku \"Trwa modyfikowanie\"... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Por favor, permaneça sentado até o capitão desligar o sinal de \"Aplicação de patches em andamento\"... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Por favor, permaneça sentado até o piloto desligar o sinal de \"Correção em progresso\"... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Vă rugăm să rămâneți așezați până când pilotul oprește semnul \"Repararea este în curs\"... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Пожалуйста, оставайтесь на местах, пока капитан не выключит знак \'Выполняется исправление\'... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Molimo vas da ostanete u sedištima dok kapetan ne isključi znak \"Zakrpa u toku\"... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">Lütfen pilot \'Yamalama işlemi devam ediyor\' ışığını söndürene kadar yerinizde kalın... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_13">Ετοιμάζουμε την τροποποιημένη σας εφαρμογή, ζεστή και φρέσκια... 🍳</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_12">אנא שב במקומך עד שהקפטן יכבה את סימן \"תהליך התיקון בעיצומו\"... 💺✈️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_15">Hemû sistemên normal e... rêbaza sazkirinê ew asta stêr e... 🚀</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_18">Tətbiqin üstün mövqeyin yamaqlanmayandan yamaqlanana dəyişdirir... 📦⚛️ </string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_16">Hêzdarî derxistin, wek şêrçeyê lîmûna dîjîtal... 🍋</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_14">bytecode এর সাথে নম্রভাবে আলোচনা করা হচ্ছে... 🤝</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?

Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_17">Sepîka xwe teşvîq bike ku ji xwerêya xwe ya çêtir bibîne... 🌱</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_19">Tətbiqinizin hərarəti var və yeganə resept daha çox yamaqdır... 🩺🔔 </string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_20">Lazımsız olanı silirəm. Zəhmət olmasa, gözləyin... 🗑️ </string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_15">Όλα τα συστήματα ονομαστικά... η τροχιά τροποποίησης είναι σταθερή... 🚀</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_18">Guherîna sepanê ji unpatched bo patched... 📦⚛️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_16">Εξάγοντας επιπλέον ενέργεια, σαν χυμό από ψηφιακό λεμόνι... 🍋</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_16">Pressage d\'un maximum de puissance, comme le jus d\'un citron numérique... 🍋</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_15">ระบบทั้งหมดทำงานปกติ... เส้นทางการแพตชิ่งเสถียร... 🚀</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_17">Ενθαρρύνοντας την εφαρμογή να αποδεχτεί τον νέο, καλύτερο εαυτό της... 🌱</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_17">Encouragez l\'application à accepter sa nouvelle version améliorée... 🌱</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_19">Sepeka we guherîna re, û tenê pêşniyara sazbarîyê ji bêtir sazkirinê agahdarin... 🩺🔔</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_16">รีดพลังงานพิเศษออกมา เหมือนคั้นน้ำจากมะนาวดิจิทัล... 🍋</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_20">Nonsens vedigere. Heke hewce bike bibînin... 🗑️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_17">ส่งเสริมให้แอปยอมรับตัวเองในเวอร์ชันใหม่ที่ดีกว่า... 🌱</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_18">Αλλάζοντας την υπέρθεση της εφαρμογής από μη τροποποιημένη σε τροποποιημένη... 📦⚛️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_18">เปลี่ยนสถานะซ้อนทับของแอปจากที่ยังไม่ได้แพตช์เป็นแพตช์แล้ว... 📦⚛️</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_19">Η εφαρμογή σας έχει πυρετό, και η μόνη συνταγή είναι περισσότερες τροποποιήσεις... 🩺🔔</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_19">आपकी ऐप को एक बुखार है, और इसके लिए केवल एक मेडिकल रेफरेंस है... 🩺🔔</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="patcher_message_19">แอปของคุณมีไข้ และวิธีรักษาเดียวคือต้องใช้แพตช์เพิ่ม... 🩺🔔</string>
